feed.title: Anas' Infosec Blog
feed.subtitle: A infosec blog where I document my findings, and the knowlegde I aquire throughout my Journey.

entry.title: Pwnable.kr: A journey through the land of binary exploitation.

link.title: Pwnable.kr: A journey through the land of binary exploitation.

entry.summary: In these series of blog posts, I will attempt to solve most levels of pwnable.kr as part of my plan to learn more about Binary analysis and exploitation. Pwnable.kr has 4 levels of difficulties: Toddler’s Bottle, Rookis, Grotesque and Hacker’s Secret. This first post will contain the first 5 levels (Toddler’s Bottle levels): fd, collision, bof, flag and passcode. Here goes nothing ! fd The ...
